chain.thought: Explanation: Japan’s best time was 10.64 (Hiroyasu Tsuchie and Yuta Kanno), while Thailand’s best time was 10.72 (Reanchai Srihawong). Since 10.64 is faster than 10.72, Japan finished earlier.

judge_thought: Explanation: Japan’s fastest time is 10.64 (Hiroyasu Tsuchie in Heat 1 and Yuta Kanno in Heat 2), while Thailand’s fastest time is 10.72 (Reanchai Srihawong in Heat 3). Since 10.64 is faster (earlier) than 10.72, Japan finished earlier.
